title: Hornet Removal in Tuckahoe, Westchester | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Tuckahoe, Westchester. Safe, effective hornet nest elimination from $350-$550. Licensed experts serving Tuckahoe homes and businesses. Call now!
intro: Hornets pose a serious threat to Tuckahoe residents and their properties, especially during warmer months when these aggressive insects build nests in eaves, trees, and attics. Best Pest Control NYC provides professional hornet removal services throughout Tuckahoe, from the historic Main Street area to the residential neighborhoods near Bronxville Road. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests and prevent future infestations, with services priced between $350 and $550 depending on nest size and location.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of pest management experience to Tuckahoe, combining advanced removal techniques with eco-friendly solutions that protect your family and pets. Our licensed technicians respond quickly to hornet emergencies throughout Westchester, providing same-day or next-day service to ensure your property is safe from these dangerous stinging insects.
localContext: Tuckahoe's tree-lined streets and mix of early 20th-century homes and modern residences create ideal nesting conditions for hornets, particularly in older attics, garden sheds, and the mature trees surrounding Parkway Oval and Lake Isle Country Club. The village's proximity to wooded areas and its established neighborhoods mean hornet activity peaks from late spring through early fall, making professional removal essential for outdoor activities and property safety.

faqs.question: How much does hornet removal cost in Tuckahoe?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal services in Tuckahoe typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the nest size, location accessibility, and height. Ground-level nests are generally less expensive, while nests in high trees, within wall voids, or requiring specialized equipment fall at the higher end of the price range. We provide free estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Tuckahoe?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day hornet removal service throughout Tuckahoe and Westchester County. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, including treatment, nest removal, and preventative measures. Emergency situations involving nests near entrances or high-traffic areas receive priority scheduling to ensure your safety.

faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets, wasps, and yellow jackets?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than wasps and yellow jackets, typically measuring up to 1.5 inches long with distinctive white and black markings. They build large, gray, paper-like nests usually suspended in trees or under eaves. Hornets are more aggressive than most wasps when their nest is threatened and can sting multiple times, making professional removal crucial for Tuckahoe properties.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets in Tuckahoe?
faqs.answer: Yes, our hornet removal process prioritizes the safety of your family and pets. We use targeted treatment methods and professional-grade equipment to eliminate hornets while minimizing environmental impact. We'll provide clear instructions on any temporary precautions needed during treatment, and the area is typically safe for normal activity within a few hours of service completion.
